---
is-author-page: true
disable-spanning: true

author: "Melek Borak"

author-bio: >
   CPA, business consultant. Event planner at The London Event School
   (corporate and bespoke). British Council certified study-abroad guide.
   Based in London.

author-links:
  - icon: twitter
    text: "Twitter"
    href: "https://twitter.com/melekferborak"
  - icon: globe
    text: "T24 Articles"
    href: "https://t24.com.tr/etiketler/Melek%20Borak"

listing:
  contents: .
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 3
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, title, date, description]
---
